---
title: "Harry Gavin Young"
---

## Harry Gavin Young

**Dates:** (b.Scotland 1854/5)

### Description

son of the Rev. James Gavin Young, Vicar of Hursley

### Biography

He was at Uppingham School during the 1871 census and subsequently served in the Indian Police.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 12 [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
